# Project Status

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **Module over `Γ(Y,⊤)` on `SheafOfModules` hom-sets — internalHom brick 1 foundation (iter-041, VERIFIED — `homModuleOverGlobalSections` + `linearOverGlobalSections` axiom-clean; sorry 1→1; axioms 27→27):**
  Building the per-section module structure of `ℋom_{𝒪_Y}(M,N)` (the atom every `internalHom` section carries, taking `Y:=↑U`). The structure sheaf `Y.ringCatSheaf` is `RingCat`-valued (forgets commutativity), so Mathlib's `Linear`-over-`CommRing` on `ModuleCat` hom-sets is NOT available on `SheafOfModules` hom-sets. (a) **Recover the per-open `CommRing`** via `letI : CommRing ↑(Y.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj U) := inferInstanceAs (CommRing Γ(Y, U.unop))` (defeq to the carrier — verified). (b) **The action:** `r : Γ(Y,⊤)` acts on `φ:M⟶N` by `⟨internalHomSmulVal r φ⟩`, where `internalHomSmulVal := PresheafOfModules.Hom.mk (fun U => globalSectionRestrict r U • φ.val.app U) <naturality>` and `globalSectionRestrict r U := (Y.ringCatSheaf.obj.map (homOfLE le_top).op) r`. (c) **Naturality of the action** closes by `rw [← globalSectionRestrict_naturality r f, restrictScalars_map_smul (RingCat.Hom.hom (Y.ringCatSheaf.obj.map f)) …, Linear.comp_smul, φ.val.naturality f, Linear.smul_comp]`; `globalSectionRestrict_naturality` (global restriction commutes with `R.map f`) = `rw [← CategoryTheory.comp_apply, ← map_comp]; congr 1` (uniqueness of `Opens`-into-`⊤`); `restrictScalars_map_smul` (`(restrictScalars g).map (g a • h) = a • (restrictScalars g).map h`) = pointwise `ModuleCat.hom_ext; LinearMap.ext; rw [restrictScalars.map_apply]; change …; rw [restrictScalars.map_apply, restrictScalars.smul_def (M:=Q)]; simp`. (d) **Module/Linear axioms** all by `apply SheafOfModules.hom_ext; apply PresheafOfModules.hom_ext; intro X; letI <CommRing>; change <section-level eq>; rw [globalSectionRestrict_<op>, <ModuleCat smul lemma>]`. (e) **`internalHom` functor itself is a confirmed multi-iter from-scratch Mathlib-gap layer** (loogle/grep @041: no `internalHom`/`ihom`/`sheafHom`/`MonoidalClosed`/`Linear` for `(Pre)SheafOfModules`, no over-open restriction functor) — see Known Blockers; do NOT expect a one-iter build.
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` CLOSED — `star_unit` discharged via 2nd monoidal anchor + FULL term-mode assembly (iter-040, VERIFIED — `htensorComparison_unit_isIso` + `H_tensor` both `sorryAx`-free; sorry 2→1; axioms 26→27; build exit 0; 5th §1 deep theorem):**
  The lane closed exactly as the @039-corrected plan predicted; the tripwire (a 3rd distinct coherence) did NOT fire — exactly ONE sanctioned anchor added. (a) **2nd/final monoidal anchor** `External.tensorMod_rightUnitality {X} (M N : X.Modules)` = the internal right-unitor TRIANGLE `(tensorAssoc M N 𝒪_X).hom ≫ (tensorLeft M).map (tensorRightUnitor N).hom = (tensorRightUnitor (tensorMod M N)).hom`, **general over `M N`** (NOT specialized to `F`/`f^*H` — specializing would smuggle the goal), placed with the internal-monoidal layer (~Basic.lean:664). In-family with `External.sheafifyTensorComparison{,Left}` (the whole tensor layer is anchor-backed bare-NatIsos with no `MonoidalCategory` coherence data), strictly weaker than 1.1.3. (b) **The discharge chain (recipe B2 — pure term mode):** after `rw [hm']` (the @039 laxity substitution) the goal is `(tR f^*𝒪).map h ≫ α ≫ (F ◁ ((f^*H◁ε)≫ρ) ≫ f^*i⁻¹) = u.hom ≫ h ≫ (BC F).map i⁻¹`. Legs: `hS2` = assoc slot-3 naturality **at `ε = (pullbackUnit f).hom` directly** (`tensorAssocNatIso₃ F (f^*H) .inv.naturality ε` + `hb`-rfl + `Functor.comp_map`); `htri` = anchor (a) at `M:=F,N:=f^*H`; `hP : α ≫ (F ◁ ((f^*H◁ε)≫ρ)) = ((F⊗f^*H)◁ε) ≫ ρ_{F⊗f^*H}` (`map_comp`+`hS2`+`htri`); `hw`/`hru` = ν-naturality legs (`tensorRightMapIso (pullbackUnit f)`/`tensorRightUnitorNatIso .naturality h`) **typed directly in `tensorMod F (f^*H)` form, closed by `exact`** (the naturality square emerges in the defeq `tensorBC f F (H..)` form — recipe B1); `hu_hom : u.hom = (I◁ε)≫ρ_I` (unfold `tensorUnitBC`); `hmaster := (congrArg ((tR f^*𝒪).map h ≫ ·) hP).trans hν`; final = split `F ◁ (ν ; f^*i⁻¹)` via `(tensorLeft F).map_comp`, reassociate the common tail out, apply `hmaster`, reassociate back. (c) **HARD-WON dead-ends (reconfirmed):** `rw [Category.assoc]`, `simp only [← Category.assoc]`, `rw [Functor.map_comp]`, AND even `rw` of a clean local hyp (`rw [hP]`/`rw [hmaster]`) ALL stall on these sheafification `≫` composites; `← Category.assoc` fires inconsistently (forward fails) — do NOT rely on either. Whole assembly rebuilt in term mode (`congrArg (g ≫ ·)`/`(· ≫ g)` / `Category.assoc _ _ _` / `F.map_comp` / `Eq.trans`), defeq-tolerant, bypasses `rw`'s discrimination tree. (d) **Last-calc-step gotcha:** ending the final `calc` at `(tensorBaseChangeFunctor f F).map i.inv` makes `Category.assoc`'s metavariable unsynthesizable (`?c` must be both `tensorLeft F`-form and `tensorBaseChangeFunctor`-form syntactically); FIX = end the calc at the **defeq** `(tensorLeft F).map (f^*i.inv)` form (`calc` closes up to defeq). 1.1.3 lane: @035 STEP1+2 · @036 2.5abc · @037 2.5d · @038 STEP3 EW assembly · @039 1st anchor landed+used · @040 2nd anchor + close. Do NOT reopen.
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` STEP 3 — `f^*` right-unitality anchor landed + used; `Iso.eq_comp_inv` to expose an opaque laxity (iter-039, VERIFIED — `External.pullback_rightUnitality` landed `sorryAx`-free; sorry 2→2; axioms 25→26):**
  Discharge route for `star_unit` partially executed. (a) **`Iso.eq_comp_inv` solves for an opaque laxity:** given a coherence anchor `hanch : μ ; F(ρ) = ν-collapse`, `(Iso.eq_comp_inv (Functor.mapIso F i)).mpr hanch` rewrites it into `μ = ν-collapse ≫ F(i⁻¹)`, after which `rw [μ-eq]` substitutes the laxity into the universal element (compiles). Reusable whenever an opaque comparison appears inside a corepr universal element and you have a coherence relating it to a unit collapse. (b) **CRITICAL plan correction:** after the `f^*` anchor, `star_unit` does NOT close — it bottoms out at the INTERNAL `tensorMod`/`tensorAssoc` right-unitor triangle, which is NOT derivable (opaque `sheafifyTensorComparison{,Left}` LHS vs comparison-free unitor RHS). The hand-built tensor structure being deliberately NOT a `MonoidalCategory` means **each needed internal coherence (triangle/pentagon/unit) must be anchored separately** as an in-family `External.*` axiom. See Known Blockers. (c) **rw-on-sheafification stays dead** at the `tensorBC`↔`tensorMod F (f^*·)` boundary (reconfirmed); canonicalize `have`s on `tensorBC` or go term-mode `Eq.trans`.
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` STEP 3 — Eilenberg–Watts close + θ_𝒪-iso via coyoneda reflection (iter-038, VERIFIED — `H_tensor` body sorry-free; sorry 2→2 STRUCTURE-changed; axioms 23→25, +2 sanctioned):**
  `H_tensor` body = full EW assembly: `haveI hau := admissible_tensorUnit …; haveI : IsIso (htensorComparison …) := External.eilenbergWatts_htensorComparison f I F ha hau (htensorComparison_unit_isIso …) hN ha'; exact ⟨(asIso …).symm⟩`. Re-signed with `(hN : N.IsQuasicoherent)` (disprove-pass; only comments consumed `H_tensor`). (a) **θ_𝒪-iso via coyoneda reflection + value-at-𝟙:** to show a project map `θ` (landing in a corepresented object) is iso — `Coyoneda.isIso` + `isIso_op_iff` reduce `IsIso θ` ⟸ `IsIso (coyoneda.map θ.op)`; build the target iso `Ψ := coyoneda.mapIso i.symm.op ≪≫ (homTensorFunctor f I F).coreprW ≪≫ Functor.isoWhiskerLeft (tensorBaseChangeFunctor f F) (coyoneda.mapIso u.op)`; prove `coyoneda.map θ.op ≫ α.hom = Ψ.hom` by `coyonedaEquiv.injective` (value at 𝟙) — `rw [coyonedaEquiv_comp, coyonedaEquiv_coyoneda_map, hθ, Iso.inv_hom_id_app_apply, hΨ]; simp only […, Functor.isoWhiskerLeft_hom, Functor.whiskerLeft_app]; erw [Functor.coreprW_hom_app …]; change <clean universal-element coherence>`; then `θ.op` iso via `Coyoneda.isIso`, `θ` via `(isIso_op_iff _).mp`. (b) **CRITICAL: use the GENUINE `Functor.coreprW`, NOT `(H_represents …).some`** — the latter is `Classical.choice` and is NOT defeq to `coreprW` (`coreprx`/`coreprX` = `h`/`H` ONLY for the genuine one); register `haveI hcI := External.H_existence f I F ha` so corepr defeqs fire. (c) **`erw` not `rw`** for `coreprW_hom_app` across the `homTensorFunctor`-vs-`⋙`-unfolding boundary (non-syntactic instance path; same family as @036/@037 `erw` gotchas). (d) **`Admissible` transports along an iso of the underlying module:** the `lfp_I` (`IsFinitePresentation`) field moves via `ObjectProperty.prop_of_iso (SheafOfModules.isFinitePresentation X.ringCatSheaf) e.symm ha.lfp_I` (`IsFinitePresentation` is `IsClosedUnderIsomorphisms`). (e) **`isoWhiskerLeft` is `Functor.isoWhiskerLeft`** (bare name unknown). Helpers: `tensorUnitBC f I : tensorBC f I 𝒪_S ≅ I = (tensorLeft I).mapIso pullbackUnit ≪≫ tensorRightUnitor I`; `admissible_tensorUnit`. RESIDUAL `star_unit` = `f^*` right-unitality coherence, see Known Blockers — needs `External.pullback_rightUnitality`.
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` STEP 2.5-d — θ-naturality (per-morphism) via corepr reflection + term-mode square composer (iter-037, VERIFIED — 2 decls axiom-clean; sorry 2→2; axioms 23→23 net unchanged):**
  Landed `htensorComparison_naturality` (per-morphism square for `ψ:N⟶N'`, left vert = `HMapFst` on `(tensorBaseChangeFunctor f I).map ψ`) + private helper `compose_three_squares`. (a) **TERM-MODE ONLY on sheafification/`tensorBC` composites (HARD-WON, reconfirmed ~51 REPL probes):** `rw`/`reassoc_of%`/`slice`/`set`/`calc` ALL FAIL — morphisms carry non-syntactic sheafification instance paths + `tensorBC`(=`tensorMod F (f^*·)`) defeq-not-syntactic junctions (`rw` matches only to reducible transparency; `set` *silently* fails to abbreviate `pullbackTensorComparison.app….hom` legs; `calc` throws `failed to synthesize Trans Eq Eq`). FIX = package the chain as `compose_three_squares` (generic: 3 commuting squares → one fourfold-composite eq, pure `congrArg`+`Category.assoc`, axiom-free). (b) **Corepr reflection for a naturality square:** both verticals-composed-with-θ are morphisms OUT of corepr obj `H(I⊗N,F)` ⇒ apply `(H_represents …).some.inv.app W'` (bijection) to reduce square to identity of universal elements. `step2` (LHS) expands `HMapFst` via `coyoneda.map_preimage` + `(coyoneda.map m.op).app W c = m ≫ c` (rfl) + `NatTrans.comp_app`/`types_comp_apply`/`Functor.whiskerLeft_app`/`Iso.inv_hom_id_app_apply`; `step3` (RHS) via `(NatTrans.naturality_apply α.inv _ _).symm`; `star`(★)=universal-element naturality = `compose_three_squares` of `whisker_exchange` + `(tensorAssocNatIso₃ F L).inv.naturality` (bridge `inv.app Y = (tensorAssoc F L Y).hom` by rfl; `.hom` direction gives type mismatch) + 2nd-slot naturality of `External.pullbackTensorComparison`; close `step2.trans((congrArg (α.inv.app W') star).trans step3.symm)`. (c) **GOTCHAS:** `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` arg order is `f₁ g₁ f₂ g₂`; presheaf `tensorHom`-comp simp lemmas fire only with explicit `(R := X.presheaf)`, residual ModuleCat `⊗ₘ`+id goal closes by `MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange` via `exact` (not `rw`); use `NatTrans.naturality_apply` NOT deprecated `FunctorToTypes.naturality` (latter → `ConcreteCategory (Type u)` typeclass-stuck). STEP 2.5 substrate now COMPLETE; next = STEP 3 θ-iso close (needs gated `External.pullbackUnit` + LFP-scoped EW anchor).
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` STEP 2.5 — functorial substrate: anchor single-slot re-type + `H(-,F)` functorial in 1st slot (iter-036, VERIFIED — 6 decls axiom-clean; sorry 2→2; axioms 23→23 net unchanged):**
  Built the functorial scaffold STEP 3's presentation/Watts argument needs. (a) **Single-slot anchor re-type over full bifunctor** — `External.pullbackTensorComparison` RE-TYPED object→single-variable `NatIso` `pullback f ⋙ tensorLeft (f^*A) ≅ tensorLeft A ⋙ pullback f` (natural in 2nd slot, 1st slot `A` a parameter); object form `(… f A).app B`. **Net axiom count unchanged** (re-type, not re-add). When a comparison NatIso is only ever used with one slot FIXED (here 1st = `H(I,F)`; θ-naturality varies only `N`), re-type to the single-variable form natural in the varying slot — reuses `tensorLeft`/`pullback`, ZERO new functor-building, ~100 LOC saved vs the product-category bifunctor (cf. `tensorThenSheafify`). (b) **corepr→covariant-functor packaging** `HMapFst` (`H(-,F)` functorial in 1st slot): `φ:J⟶J'` ⟹ conjugate the precomposition NatTrans `Functor.whiskerLeft (tensorBaseChangeFunctor f F)(coyoneda.map φ.op)` by the two `H_represents…some` corepr isos, reflect through `coyoneda.preimage` (Full+Faithful `Coyoneda.coyoneda_{full,faithful}`) + `.unop` (direction flips twice ⇒ covariant). Functoriality `HMapFst_comp`: `rw [HMapFst×3, ← unop_comp]; congr 1; rw [← Functor.preimage_comp]; congr 1; rw [op_comp, Functor.map_comp, Functor.whiskerLeft_comp]; simp only [Category.assoc]; erw [Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]; rfl`. **GOTCHA: `erw` (not `rw`/`simp`) for id-cancellation across a `⋙`-unfolded functor app** — `rw [Category.id_comp]` SILENTLY fails to match `… ≫ 𝟙 ≫ …` because `homTensorFunctor f J F` vs its `⋙`-unfolding is non-syntactic; `Functor.whiskerLeft` is current name (not bare `whiskerLeft`). (c) **VACUITY CAVEAT (soundness flag):** the TOTAL functor `HFunctorFst : X.Modules ⥤ S.Modules` requires carrier `∀ J, Admissible f J F`, forcing every `𝒪_X`-module LFP ⇒ **not satisfiable in general, downstream-vacuous**. Reusable substrate is the **per-morphism** `HMapFst{,_id,_comp}` (no totality hyp). **STEP 3 (incl. abstract-EW NatTrans-of-two-endofunctors plan) must phrase θ-naturality per-morphism via `HMapFst`, NOT the total endofunctor**, or restrict `N` to an LFP subcategory. (d) **θ-naturality (`htensorComparisonNatTrans`) DEFERRED, no sorry** — `simp`/`aesop`/`unfold` all leave the full square. Route = corepresentation reflection: apply `(H_represents f (tensorBC f I N) F _).some.hom.app (tensorMod (H f I F)(hAdm I)) N'` to reduce to identity of universal elements, using corepr-iso naturality + `tensorAssoc` naturality + 2nd-slot naturality of the re-typed anchor + `HMapFst` via `Functor.map_preimage`; ~60–120 lines. Do NOT retry `simp`/`aesop`.
- **1.1.3 `H_tensor` substrate — canonical comparison map θ via corepr-inverse + f^*-monoidality anchor (iter-035, VERIFIED — 2 decls axiom-clean; sorry 2→2):**
  The clean 1.1.2 coyoneda-reflection route does NOT generalize to general `N` (needs internal-hom on `S.Modules`, ABSENT) — forced onto anchor-and-assemble (3rd application after 1.4 `affine_fp_tilde`, 1.2 close). (a) **STEP-1 sanctioned anchor** `External.pullbackTensorComparison f A B : tensorMod (f^*A)(f^*B) ≅ f^*(tensorMod A B)` (f^* strong monoidal — TRUE general fact ∥ `sheafifyTensorComparison`; `Scheme.Modules.pullback`/`PresheafOfModules.pullback` carry NO monoidal struct, loogle-confirmed @035). **External anchor count 22→23.** (b) **STEP-2 comparison map θ**, `htensorComparison : H(I⊗_S N,F) ⟶ H(I,F)⊗N`, built via the **corepr-inverse map-builder** idiom: `(H_represents f (tensorBC f I N) F ha').some.inv.app W (e)` applied to the universal element `e = (tensorRight (f^*N)).map (h f I F ha) ≫ (tensorAssoc F (f^*H)(f^*N)).hom ≫ (tensorLeft F).map (pullbackTensorComparison …).hom`. **Type-checked FIRST TRY** — the defeqs `tensorBC f I N = tensorMod I (f^*N)` (domain) and `tensorBC f F W = tensorMod F (f^*(H⊗N))` (codomain) resolve with NO `show`/`change`. Generalizes: to build a map INTO a non-representing object `W` from a universal element, use `(corepr).some.inv.app W e`. (c) **STEP-3 (the iso) is POLICY-GATED, NOT closed** — `H_tensor := htensorComparison.symm` once θ shown iso, which needs a SECOND general anchor (Eilenberg–Watts: two right-exact ⊕-preserving additive functors `S.Modules→S.Modules` agreeing on `𝒪_S` are nat-iso; Mathlib has NO EW, loogle-confirmed) OR affine+Watts on `Mod-A`. Adjacent sub-steps both need absent facts: θ_{𝒪_S}=id needs `f^*𝒪_S≅𝒪_X` (KB GAP for `Scheme.Modules.pullback`); θ-naturality needs the bifunctor re-type FIRST. **Next iter: STEP 2.5 re-type `pullbackTensorComparison`→NatIso of bifunctors + θ→NatTrans (the @031→@032 pattern), THEN decide+anchor EW.** Do NOT attempt STEP 3 with only the single anchor.
- **Unitor naturality + invertible-object equivalence → close 1.1.2 (iter-034, VERIFIED — `H_tensor_invertible` CLOSED, axiom-flat; sorry 3→2):**
  STEP D–F of the monoidal layer. (a) **Term-mode reassociation across the sheafification boundary** — on a
  sheafification naturality square, `rw [Category.assoc]`/`rw [step]`/`rw [reassoc_of% step]`/`slice_lhs`/`simp only
  [← Category.assoc]` ALL silently fail to match `≫` (the `≫` carries a non-syntactic `CategoryStruct`/instance path).
  CLOSE by a pure term-mode `Eq.trans` chain: `(Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((congrArg (· ≫ e) step).trans
  ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans ((congrArg (e' ≫ ·) cnat).trans (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm)))`. THE linchpin trick for
  the whole unitor layer. (b) **Tensor interchange** `tensorRightMapIso`: `ext1 Z; simp only [tensorHom_app, comp_app,
  id_app]; exact (MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange _ _).symm` — `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` does NOT fire on
  `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorHom` (standalone def, not `MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom`). (c) **First-factor
  associator-naturality mirror** `tensorAssocNatIso₁`: `assocIdx*₁`'s FIXED second slot must be `tensorHom (𝟙 L)(𝟙 L')`
  (NOT `𝟙 (tensorObj L L')`) so `associator_naturality φ (𝟙 L)(𝟙 L')` matches DEFINITIONALLY (then plain
  `map_comp.symm.trans (congr_map …) map_comp`, no id-bridge; `𝟙 (tensorObj)` forces a non-defeq bridge `rw [←
  presheaf_id_tensorHom_id]` can't land — implicit-`R` spelling `X.presheaf` vs `X.ringCatSheaf.obj`). (d) **Invertible ⇒
  equivalence cheaply**: `tensorRightEquivOfInvertible := Equivalence.mk (tensorRight L)(tensorRight L')` — NO
  triangle/coherence; unit/counit are NatIso composites of `tensorRightUnitorNatIso`/`tensorRightMapIso`/`tensorAssocNatIso₁`.
  (e) **Twist + close**: `homTensorFunctorTwistIso := isoWhiskerRight (tensorRearrangeNatIso F L).symm (coyoneda …) ≪≫
  isoWhiskerLeft (tensorLeft F) (coyonedaCompFF hFF I)` with `hFF := equiv.fullyFaithfulFunctor` (functor-comp assoc
  defeq, no explicit `Functor.associator`); then `H_tensor_invertible := ⟨(coyoneda.preimageIso (r₁ ≪≫ twist ≪≫
  r₂.symm)).unop.symm⟩`, `rᵢ := (H_represents …).some`, `coyoneda` Full+Faithful auto. Do NOT reopen the 1.1.2 lane — complete.
- **3-NatIso decomposition — naturality across a sheafification-comparison boundary (iter-033, VERIFIED — cracked the @032 linchpin):**
  proving `tensorAssocNatIso₂/₃` (naturality of `tensorAssoc` over the `External.sheafifyTensorComparison{,Left}`
  anchors) BLOWS UP if done as a single `NatIso.ofComponents` + hand reassociation: `rw [Category.assoc]`/`reassoc_of%`
  across the comparison `.app` boundary won't match (`tensorThenSheafify.obj` won't unfold under rw transparency),
  and a concrete pair-`(a,b)` object eq sends `isDefEq`/`whnf` divergent (>4M heartbeats). FIX: **decompose each
  `tensorAssocNatIso` into THREE composed NatIsos** `leg1 ≪≫ leg2 ≪≫ leg3`, one per leg of `tensorAssoc` (2 comparison
  anchors + sheafified associator) via hand-built index functors `assocIdx{L,R}{,₃}`. `≪≫` does object identifications
  at full elaborator transparency, so NO cross-leg reassociation is ever needed. Each leg: (comparison legs)
  `have h := (anchor (X := X)).hom.naturality ((tensorHom (𝟙 F.val) φ.val, 𝟙 L.val) : … ⟶ …)` — morphism EXPLICIT,
  objects abstract, ascribe the product-morphism source/target type + pin `(X := X)` else metavars don't resolve;
  then `simp only [sheafifyFst/Snd_map_eq, tensorLeft/Right_map_eq, tensorThenSheafify_map_eq, Iso.app_hom/inv,
  Functor.comp_map] at h ⊢; exact h`. (associator leg) `exact (sheaf.map_comp _ _).symm.trans
  ((sheaf.congr_map (MonoidalCategory.associator_naturality (C := PreMod) …)).trans (sheaf.map_comp _ _))` — `←
  Functor.map_comp` as rw/simp FAILS; use the term-level Eq-chain. (sheafify-of-identity leg, e.g. a fixed factor)
  `convert h using 4; exact congrArg (fun a => sheaf.map (tensorHom a φ.val)) Aeq` where `Aeq := ((congrArg (fun m =>
  (sheaf.map m).val) (presheaf_id_tensorHom_id …)).trans (sheafify_map_id_val _)).symm`. Then
  `tensorRearrangeNatIso := natIso₂ ≪≫ Functor.isoWhiskerRight (tensorBraidingNatIso L) (tensorLeft F) ≪≫ natIso₃`
  (name is `CategoryTheory.Functor.isoWhiskerRight`, NOT bare). PITFALLS: `X.ringCatSheaf.obj` vs
  `X.presheaf ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat` and `MonoidalCategoryStruct.tensorHom` vs
  `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorHom` are defeq-NOT-syntactic — rw/simp keyed on one silently miss the other,
  cross only via term-level `exact`/`congrArg`; `Functor.map_id` is a NAME CLASH (bare → applicative `Functor`),
  use `CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id`; `MonoidalCategory.id_tensorHom_id` won't fire via rw/simp (works as term after
  `ext1 Z` + `tensorHom_app`).
- **Hand-built bifunctors that `whnf`-reduce cheaply for the (1.1.2) naturality layer (iter-032, VERIFIED):**
  the `MonoidalCategory.tensor ⋙ moduleSheafification` packaging of `tensorThenSheafify` /
  `sheafifyFst/SndTensorThenSheafify` makes `.map` blow up `whnf` (monoidal-instance `tensorHom`). FIX:
  RE-BUILD each as an explicit `Functor` — `obj := ~(tensorObj … …)`, `map f := ~(tensorHom (…f.1).val f.2)` —
  objects unchanged so anchors + `tensorAssoc` stay axiom-clean. `map_comp`: `refine Eq.trans ?_ (sheafification.map_comp _ _); congr 1; rw [prod_comp_fst, prod_comp_snd]; erw [Functor.map_comp]; rw [SheafOfModules.comp_val]; …`
  — the key is **`erw`** (plain `rw`/`simp` will NOT match the product-projected `≫` instance). `map_id` similarly
  via `erw [CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id]` — MUST fully-qualify (bare `Functor.map_id` resolves to the *monad*
